name: Bookmark
description:
This +3 dagger belongs to {@creature Artus Cimber|ToA}. While you have the dagger drawn, you can use a bonus action to activate one of the following properties:
{"type": "list", "items": ["Cause a blue gem set into the dagger's pommel to shed bright light in a 20-foot radius and dim light for an additional 20 feet, or make the gem go dark.", "Turn the dagger into a compass that, while resting on your palm, points north.", "Cast {@spell dimension door} from the dagger. Once this property is used,
